events.agenda: Inaugural Bogotá dbt Meetup covering the evolution of the data landscape toward the modern data stack and the importance of data transformation pipelines at scale.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data, with talks predominantly focused on community members' experience with dbt.
events.raw_text:
Thu, Aug 10, 2023 · 6:30 PM to 8:30 PM COT

WeWork Usaquén, Bogotá

Bogotá dbt Meetup

Talk #1: The data landscape's evolution over the last 10 years, from a Hadoop-centered ecosystem to the modern data stack, and upcoming trends including dbt and generative AI. By Andres Luna.

Talk #2: The importance of data transformation pipelines for companies, common problems at scale, and how well-implemented pipelines solve them. By Sebastian Ballesteros.

talks.description: A journey through the data ecosystem's evolution from Hadoop-centered architectures to the modern data stack, and predictions on upcoming trends including dbt and generative AI.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 🗣️Talk #1: Data landscape has rapidly evolved in the last 10 years... By Andres Luna
talks.title: The past, present, and future of the data ecosystem

talks.description: The importance of data transformation pipelines for streamlining processing and decision-making, and how well-implemented pipelines solve common scaling problems.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 🗣️Talk #2: Let's discuss the importance of data transformation pipelines for companies... By Sebastian Ballesteros
talks.title: Data transformation pipelines at scale

events.agenda: Talks on data democratization through dbt and the importance of testing and business validation in analytics pipelines.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data, with talks predominantly focused on community members' experience with dbt.
events.raw_text:
Wed, Nov 22, 2023 · 6:30 PM to 8:30 PM COT

WeWork Usaquén, Bogotá

Bogotá dbt Meetup

Talk #1: Data Democratization: How dbt empowers non-data expert teams and brings us closer to an environment where data and its processes are democratized. By Diego Cano from Xepelin.

Talk #2: Testing in Analytics: We will discuss the importance of data testing, and business validation at the analytics pipeline. By Laura Grandas from Factored.

talks.description: How dbt empowers non-data-expert teams and brings organizations closer to democratized data and processes.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 🗣️Talk #1: Data Democratization: How dbt empowers non-data expert teams... By Diego Cano from Xepelin
talks.title: Data Democratization

talks.description: The importance of data testing and business validation throughout the analytics pipeline.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 🗣️Talk #2: Testing in Analytics: We will discuss the importance of data testing, and business validation at the analytics pipeline. By Laura Grandas from Factored
talks.title: Testing in Analytics

events.agenda: Talks on dbt's impact at La Haus's Data Strategy Center and a beginner-friendly deep dive into how dbt works under the hood.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data, with talks predominantly focused on community members' experience with dbt.
events.raw_text:
Thu, Mar 21, 2024 · 6:30 PM to 8:30 PM COT

WeWork Usaquén, Bogotá

Bogotá dbt Meetup

Talk #1: dbt at the Data Strategy Center: Success Stories and Improvements. How dbt implementation redefined roles between data analysts and engineers at La Haus, optimizing teams and reducing costs and execution times in Snowflake. By Edison Ortiz from La Haus.

Talk #2: Beyond the WHY: Unveiling the WHAT and HOW of dbt. A live demo of dbt and a drill-down into its internals. By David Flechas from Factored.

talks.description: How implementing dbt at La Haus's Data Strategy Center redefined roles between analysts and engineers, optimized the team, and reduced costs and execution times in Snowflake.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 🗣️Talk #1: dbt at the Data Strategy Center: Success Stories and Improvements... By Edison Ortiz from La Haus
talks.title: dbt at the Data Strategy Center: Success Stories and Improvements

talks.description: A beginner-friendly live demo and internals walkthrough of how dbt works, aimed at those new to the tool.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 🗣️Talk #2: Beyond the WHY: Unveiling the WHAT and HOW of dbt... By David Flechas from Factored
talks.title: Beyond the WHY: Unveiling the WHAT and HOW of dbt

events.agenda: Talks on multitenant dbt/Dagster orchestration at Yello and streamlining Tableau dashboard deployment with dbt.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data, with talks predominantly focused on community members' experience with dbt.
events.raw_text:
Wed, Jun 26, 2024 · 6:30 PM to 8:30 PM COT

WeWork Usaquén, Bogotá

Bogotá dbt Meetup

Talk #1: Mastering Multitenant Orchestration with dbt and Dagster. Strategies for synthesizing actionable insights from hundreds of production databases. By Andrea Montes from Yello.

Talk #2: Streamlining Tableau Dashboard Deployment with dbt. How dbt aids dashboard deployment by consolidating dispersed domain knowledge for greater reliability and consistency. By Sebastian Quintero from Factored.

talks.description: Strategies for orchestrating dbt and Dagster across a multitenant setup to synthesize insights from hundreds of production databases.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 🗣️Talk #1: Mastering Multitenant Orchestration with dbt and Dagster... By Andrea Montes from Yello
talks.title: Mastering Multitenant Orchestration with dbt and Dagster

talks.description: How dbt aids Tableau dashboard deployment by consolidating dispersed business logic, improving data reliability, metric consistency, and dashboard maintenance.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 🗣️Talk #2: Streamlining Tableau Dashboard Deployment with dbt... By Sebastian Quintero from Factored
talks.title: Streamlining Tableau Dashboard Deployment with dbt

events.agenda: Talks on generating synthetic data in dbt using LLMs and creating business metrics with dbt.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data, with talks predominantly focused on community members' experience with dbt.
events.raw_text:
Tue, Oct 29, 2024 · 6:30 PM to 8:30 PM COT

WeWork Usaquén, Bogotá

Bogotá dbt Meetup

Talk #1: Generación de Datos Sintéticos en dbt: Extrayendo Valor de Datos No Estructurados con LLMs. Integrating LLMs into a dbt workflow to transform unstructured data into valuable insights, connecting dbt to the OpenAI API. By María Alejandra Perpiñán Barrios from La Haus.

Talk #2: Creación de métricas por medio de dbt. Using dbt to transform data and calculate business metrics efficiently with Snowflake, Bitbucket, and Git. By Miguel Alfonso Reyes Gallego from Inisoft.

talks.description: Integrating LLMs into a dbt workflow via the OpenAI API to transform unstructured data into structured, analysis-ready insights.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 🗣️Talk #1: Generación de Datos Sintéticos en dbt: Extrayendo Valor de Datos No Estructurados con LLMs... By María Alejandra Perpiñán Barrios de La Haus
talks.title: Generación de Datos Sintéticos en dbt: Extrayendo Valor de Datos No Estructurados con LLMs

talks.description: Using dbt with Snowflake, Bitbucket, and Git to build an efficient workflow for calculating business metrics.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 🗣️Talk #2: Creación de métricas por medio de dbt... By Miguel Alfonso Reyes Gallego de Inisoft
talks.title: Creación de métricas por medio de dbt

events.agenda: Talks on dbt's role in business intelligence and data governance, and secure data transformation with data masking on Databricks.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data, with talks predominantly focused on community members' experience with dbt.
events.raw_text:
Tue, Apr 22, 2025 · 6:30 PM to 8:30 PM COT

WeWork Usaquén, Bogotá

Bogotá dbt Meetup

Talk #1: dbt en Inteligencia de Negocios: Mejora las fuentes de datos y su gobernanza. dbt's impact on efficient reporting marts and data governance, covering lineage, modular transformations, version control, and collaboration. By Sebastian Clavijo from Factored.

Talk #2: Transformando Datos con Seguridad: Data Masking, Modelado y Insights con dbt y Databricks. Using dbt to implement data masking and turn raw data into insights within Databricks. By Daniel Lopez from Factored.

talks.description: How dbt's data lineage, modular transformations, version control, and collaboration features simplify building trustworthy, consistent reporting marts and improve data governance.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 🗣️Talk #1: dbt en Inteligencia de Negocios: Mejora las fuentes de datos y su gobernanza... By Sebastian Clavijo
talks.title: dbt en Inteligencia de Negocios: Mejora las fuentes de datos y su gobernanza

talks.description: Using dbt to implement data masking techniques and turn raw data into actionable insights within Databricks, balancing privacy regulation compliance with usability.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 🗣️Talk #2: Transformando Datos con Seguridad: Data Masking, Modelado y Insights con dbt y Databricks... By Daniel Lopez de Factored
talks.title: Transformando Datos con Seguridad: Data Masking, Modelado y Insights con dbt y Databricks

events.agenda: Talks on structuring dbt projects at scale for enterprise governance and friction-free access control using dbt and AWS Lake Formation.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data, with talks predominantly focused on community members' experience with dbt.
events.raw_text:
Wed, Oct 8, 2025 · 6:30 PM to 9:00 PM COT

WeWork Usaquén, Bogotá

Bogotá dbt Meetup

Talk #1: dbt Project Structuring at Scale. Best practices for architecting dbt projects serving multiple business units while maintaining code quality and team collaboration, including governance frameworks and modular structures. By Juan Ballesteros.

Talk #2: Gobernanza sin fricción: control de acceso con dbt y AWS Lake Formation. Moving from centralized data governance rules to enabling teams to manage secure column-level access themselves using dbt and Lake Formation. By Juan David Corchuelo.

talks.description: Best practices for architecting dbt projects that serve multiple business units while maintaining code quality, governance frameworks, and modular structures for independent team collaboration.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 🗣️ Talk #1: "dbt Project Structuring at Scale" Speaker: Juan Ballesteros
talks.title: dbt Project Structuring at Scale

talks.description: Moving from centralized data governance rules to team-managed, column-level secure access control using dbt and AWS Lake Formation, enabling agile data consumption via QuickSight and Metabase.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 🗣️ Talk #2: "Gobernanza sin fricción: control de acceso con dbt y AWS Lake Formation" Speaker: Juan David Corchuelo
talks.speaker_title: Ingeniero de Sistemas / AWS Solutions Architect-Associate
talks.title: Gobernanza sin fricción: control de acceso con dbt y AWS Lake Formation
